title: feat: show ens/name label in to field on verify and tx overview screens
description: When user sends to vitalik.eth (or .sol or thorname), the verify and keysign overview screens should show 'vitalik.eth (0xd8dA...6045)' instead of just the raw resolved address. Priority: vault > addressBook > ensLabel > raw. Files: Transaction.kt (add dstLabel field), SendFormViewModel.kt (capture originalInput before resolveName, pass dstLabel to Transaction), TransactionToUiModelMapper.kt (pass dstLabel through), TransactionDetailsUiModel + formattedDstAddress in VerifyTransactionViewModel.kt.
